users.title: User
users.description: Represents a user in the system with role-based access control.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user from Firebase Auth.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user, determining their permissions.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user record was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles with role information.
